abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Pursue
abilities.text: This model receives +1 Skl when targeting a model that has already activated this turn.

abilities.name: Unyielding
abilities.text: When this model would be moved or controlled by another model, its owner may drain a (soulstone) to ignore that effect.

actions.name: Mechanical Punch
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action deals +2 damage for each raise instead of +1.

actions.name: Grenade Launcher
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may suffer -1 Skl to ignore LoS. Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)2" of the target.

triggers.name: Collateral Damage
triggers.text: Remove a marker or a destructible terrain piece within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Big Boom
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (aura) of this action by 1".

actions.name: Ghost in the Shell
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Remains marker. Friendly models within (aura)3" of the target heal 2. Draw a card, then remove the target.
